title: Xmas Highland Cow Medium Snack Tray

description: Check out this wintery, Xmas Highland Cow Medium Snack Tray designed by artist, Jennifer Rose from Lesser and Pavey to get you in the Christmas Spirit. This Xmas Highland Cow Medium Snack Tray is ideal for enjoying a lunchtime snack, evening meal or bedtime supper on during the wintery Christmas period and features a wintery Highland Cow scene to get you in a cosy mood.
